desc: Agent should call create_goal exactly once (only in turn 1).
No pause_goal calls — tweak is a normal flow.
Tweak should be applied via the sanctioned apply_goal_tweak tool (the only schema-allowed channel).
apply_goal_tweak.newObjective should mention extra.txt (the added requirement).
apply_goal_tweak.newObjective should still mention base.txt (we expanded, not replaced).
After tweak+execution, the goal file (active OR archived) should mention extra.txt.
After tweak+execution, the goal file should still mention base.txt.
